_provenance.source: GGG PoE2 game data via pathofexile-dat (Mods/Stats tables + stat_descriptions.csd)
_provenance.tierConvention: T1 = strongest (PoE2 in-game convention since patch 0.2.0; entries sorted weakest first, t = count..1)
